creator: dave+freebsd@fullard.ca
text:
Created attachment 199546
Patch to update port to new version 0.13.0

Quassel 0.13.0 was released on November 17th 2018. This patch updates the Makefile and distinfo to install this release.

Full changelog: https://github.com/quassel/quassel/blob/0.13.0/ChangeLog
